title: Apollo Telehealth is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Apollo Telehealth is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Telehealth invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Apollo Telehealth:
Apollo Telehealth is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth!
